intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Rulings Tighten, FRAND Settlements Accelerate
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年欧洲IP战场呈现司法高压与商业妥协并行的态势。统一专利法院（UPC）通过多起撤销案确立严格审查标准，同时PMAC调解机制上线推动纠纷解决多元化。SEP领域，诺基亚、华为等权利人频繁利用英国法院FRAND裁定施压，促成吉利、华硕等实施者达成和解或加入专利池。欧盟法院在商标声誉及数字版权报酬上强化保护，而瑞士引入实质审查则预示全球专利质量门槛提升。整体而言，合规成本上升，诉讼策略更趋精细化。
top_signals: UPC米兰与巴黎分部连续撤销高价值专利，显示其对有效性审查的严苛立场
英国法院在Huawei v TP-Link案中确定临时许可费率，成为SEP谈判关键杠杆
EPO全面开放DOCX提交及摩尔多瓦入盟，显著降低申请流程复杂度并扩大覆盖范围
欧盟法院裁定成员国可强制在线内容公平报酬，重塑数字平台版权生态
cross_currents: 从‘诉讼对抗’转向‘费率裁定驱动和解’：权利人倾向于先在英国获取FRAND基准，再迫使全球实施者和解，而非单纯追求禁令
专利质量监管前置化：EPO质量仪表盘与瑞士实质审查改革表明，欧洲正从后端无效挑战向前端授权质量管控转移
司法效率与程序正义并重：UPC年报显示案件处理高效，但欧盟法院强调法官独立性及拒绝初步裁决的理由说明，防止效率牺牲公正
implications: 中国车企需重新评估5G/WiFi SEP风险，鉴于诺基亚与吉利和解及Sisvel专利池扩张，被动应诉成本高于主动许可
医药与高科技企业应警惕UPC‘全有或全无’的撤销风险，建议在单一专利布局中加强权利要求稳定性分析
出口欧洲的消费品品牌需严格审查商标历史叙事，避免使用虚构年份引发‘欺骗性’认定，同时建立防伪溯源体系应对假冒指控
watchlist: PMAC调解服务启动后的首批案例结果，观察其是否成为SEP纠纷的主流替代方案
EPO第三轮实践趋同周期关于分案申请和互联网披露的具体准则落地情况
英国竞争上诉法庭对高通案‘证据真空’裁定的后续影响，是否抑制反垄断集体诉讼活跃度

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC证据门槛明确，车企SEP诉讼现和解潮
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Tightens Evidence Rules; Auto SEP Disputes Shift to Settlements
daily_report.executive_line: 本周UPC确立严格证据保全标准；吉利、华硕等达成关键SEP和解，显示权利人策略从单纯诉讼转向费率裁定与许可谈判并重。
daily_report.summary_zh: 欧洲IP战情呈现司法精细化与商业和解并行的态势。UPC海牙分部明确证据保全需满足四项累积条件，提高了维权取证门槛。与此同时，汽车与通信领域的SEP纠纷出现显著缓和迹象，诺基亚与吉利全球和解、华硕加入Sisvel专利池，表明行业正寻求通过FRAND费率裁定及许可协议解决争议。此外，英国法院在分销限制与反垄断索赔中释放明确合规信号，企业需警惕恶意商标抢注新风险。

storylines.title_zh: 车企SEP诉讼转向和解与费率裁定
storylines.what_happened_zh: 诺基亚撤回对吉利诉讼并达成全球5G和解；华为聚焦英国FRAND费率裁定而撤回部分侵权索赔；华硕加入Sisvel Wi-Fi专利池。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 标志SEP权利人策略转变，利用英国法院费率裁定施压，促使实施人回归谈判桌，平行诉讼热度降温。

storylines.title_en: Auto SEP Litigation Pivots to Global Settlements
storylines.what_happened_en: Nokia settled its global 5G dispute with Geely, withdrawing Munich claims. Huawei focused on UK FRAND rates, dropping UPC infringement actions, while Asus licensed the Sisvel Wi-Fi pool.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: This signals a strategic shift where rights holders leverage rate-setting proceedings to drive licensing deals, reducing reliance on multi-jurisdictional injunction threats.

storylines.title_zh: UPC确立证据保全四项铁律
storylines.what_happened_zh: UPC海牙分部裁定证据保全令需同时满足初步证据、特定性、保密性及比例原则，且已授权专利享有有效性推定。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 大幅提高临时禁令获取难度，权利人需更精准论证样本获取必要性，防止滥用程序。

storylines.title_en: UPC Hague Sets Strict Evidence Preservation Standards
storylines.what_happened_en: The UPC Local Division in The Hague ruled that evidence production orders require plausible evidence, specificity, confidentiality, and proportionality, presuming patent validity unless clearly invalid.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: Rights holders face higher hurdles for obtaining physical samples or data, necessitating rigorous justification of necessity and preventing abusive fishing expeditions.

storylines.title_zh: 英国法院厘清分销与反垄断边界
storylines.what_happened_zh: 英上诉法院支持品牌方基于客观标准的在线销售限制；竞争上诉法庭以“证据真空”驳回高通集体诉讼索赔。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 为选择性分销体系提供合规指引，同时警示反垄断集体诉讼需扎实证据支撑，降低滥诉风险。

supporting_items.title_zh: 英国上诉法院就选择性分销体系在线限制发布指引

supporting_items.title: UK court observes “evidentiary void” in withdrawn Qualcomm 'no licence, no chips' claim

storylines.title_en: UK Courts Clarify Distribution Limits and Antitrust Risks
storylines.what_happened_en: The UK Court of Appeal upheld online sales restrictions in selective distribution, while the Competition Appeal Tribunal dismissed a £480m Qualcomm claim due to an evidentiary void.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: Brands gain clarity on defending channel controls, but antitrust claimants must secure robust third-party witness testimony to survive procedural scrutiny.

storylines.title_zh: 欧盟IP执法应对AI与恶意注册挑战
storylines.what_happened_zh: DPMA警示AI辅助恶意商标抢注激增；EUIPO领导层强调体系需适应AI生成内容挑战；兰博基尼揭示设计权新威胁。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 传统IP保护框架面临技术冲击，企业需建立更主动的监控机制，防范非真实使用意图的阻击性注册。

storylines.title_en: AI-Driven Bad Faith Filings Challenge IP Enforcement
storylines.what_happened_en: The DPMA reported a surge in AI-assisted bad-faith trademark applications targeting unregistered signs. EUIPO leaders emphasized the need to adapt frameworks to AI-generated content challenges.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: Traditional registration strategies are insufficient against automated squatting; companies must implement proactive monitoring and prepare invalidity defenses for non-use marks.

storylines.title_zh: 诺基亚撤回针对吉利车联网专利诉讼
storylines.what_happened_zh: 慕尼黑地区法院确认，诺基亚已撤回原定于今日开庭的针对吉利的诉讼。该诉讼涉及用于联网汽车的4G和5G标准必要专利（EP 3 566 488和EP 3 83...
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 本案撤诉标志着新一轮车联网专利诉讼浪潮尚未全面展开即告一段落。实务中需关注诺基亚与吉利是否达成和解或许可协议，以及该撤诉对UPC相关并行案件的具体影响。

storylines.title_en: Nokia Withdraws Connected Car SEP Action Against Geely
storylines.what_happened_en: Munich Regional Court confirmed Nokia withdrew its infringement suit against Geely regarding 4G/5G connected car patents prior to the scheduled oral hearing.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: The withdrawal suggests early resolution via settlement or licensing, impacting the trajectory of parallel UPC proceedings and signaling cooling tensions in auto SEP enforcement.

what_changed_vs_last_window: UPC海牙分部首次明确证据保全的四项累积条件，实务操作门槛具体化。
汽车领域SEP诉讼出现集中和解趋势（吉利、华硕），而非单纯推进庭审。
英国法院在反垄断与分销限制领域发布具有指导意义的最新判例。
next_watch_72h: 关注CJEU是否受理前药SPC保护案件，这可能重塑制药专利期限补偿规则。
监测华为-TP-Link在英国高等法院的FRAND费率裁定进展及其对全球许可的影响。
留意修订版TTBER生效后，首批涉及专利池和集体谈判的反垄断合规案例。

business_actions: 调整UPC维权策略，确保证据保全申请严格符合比例原则与特定性要求。
审查SEP许可协议结构，利用新TTBER指南优化专利池参与及集体谈判条款。
在德国市场加强商标监控，针对AI辅助的恶意抢注提前准备无效宣告证据。

report_items.title_zh: UPC海牙分部：证据保全令需满足四项累积条件
report_items.title_en: UPC Hague: Evidence Production Orders Require Cumulative Conditions and Proportionality
report_items.title: LD The Hague, May 11, 2026, Order, UPC-CFI_478/2025, UPC_CFI_585/2026
report_items.summary_zh: UPC海牙地方法院裁定，依据《程序规则》第190条及《统一专利法院协定》第59(1)条，发布证据保全令需满足四项累积条件：初步证据、对方控制下的特定证据、保密保护及比例原则。法院援引Winnow v Orbisk等先例，指出已授权欧洲专利具有有效性推定，除非明显无效。鉴于侵权验证需物理测试，法院批准获取部分产品样本及营销材料，但基于比例原则缩减了样本数量。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in The Hague clarified the requirements for evidence production orders under Rule 190 of the Rules of Procedure and Article 59(1) of the Unified Patent Court Agreement. The Court established that four cumulative conditions must be met: plausible evidence, specified evidence within the opposing party's control, confidentiality protection, and proportionality. Citing Winnow v Orbisk and Oppo v Panasonic, the judgment affirmed that granted European patents carry a presumption of validity, which is only displaced by clear-cut invalidity. The Court reduced the requested physi...
core_points_zh: 证据保全令需满足初步证据、特定性、保密性及比例原则四项累积条件
已授权欧洲专利享有有效性推定，仅明显无效情形可推翻该推定
为验证依赖测试的侵权，可下令提供物理样本，但需符合比例原则限制范围
core_points_en: Rule 190 RoP and Article 59(1) UPCA require plausible evidence, specific controlled evidence, confidentiality, and proportionality.
Granted European patents benefit from a validity presumption unless a clear-cut case of invalidity is demonstrated at this stage.
Physical samples may be ordered for necessary testing, but requests are strictly limited by proportionality principles.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC在证据保全阶段的审查标准，强调了对已授权专利有效性的尊重及比例原则的适用。实务中，申请人需确保证据请求的具体性与必要性，避免过度索取。对于依赖物理测试认定侵权的案件，提前规划测试方案并论证样本获取的必要性至关重要。
report_items.insight_en: This decision reinforces the structured approach of the UPC towards pre-trial evidence gathering, balancing the rights holder's need to verify infringement against the defendant's interest in avoiding disproportionate burdens. It confirms that while patent validity is presumed, the specificity and necessity of requested evidence remain subject to rigorous judicial scrutiny. For practitioners, the ruling highlights th...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: 明确UPC证据保全门槛，指导专利维权策略
Practice note/实务观察: 论证样本获取必要性时需结合具体测试需求与比例原则
What to monitor/后续观察: 关注UPC对“明显无效”标准的进一步界定及…
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clarifies the high threshold for obtaining evidence production orders, requiring precise justification of necessity and proportionality.
Practice note: When seeking physical samples for test-dependent infringement, limit requests to the minimum viable set to satisfy proportionality requirements.
What to monitor: How the UPC further defines 'clear-cut' invalidity cases that might displace the presumption of validity during evidence stages.

report_items.title_zh: CJEU需裁定：前药是否可独立获得SPC保护？
report_items.title_en: CJEU Asked to Rule on SPC Eligibility for Pro-Drugs of Previously Approved Actives
report_items.title: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟法院（CJEU）受理新案件（C-794/25），需裁定已获批活性成分的前药能否独立获得欧盟SPC保护。背景涉及武田的LDX（右旋苯丙胺前药），其虽获新药上市许可，但母体药物DEX早已上市。争议焦点在于前药是否被视为“不同”的活性物质，该裁决将澄清行业规则并解决相关诉讼。
report_items.summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) has received a new referral (Case C-794/25) concerning whether an approved pro-drug of a previously authorized active pharmaceutical ingredient qualifies for Supplementary Protection Certificate (SPC) protection independently. The case centers on lisdexamfetamine (LDX), a pro-drug of dexamphetamine (DEX). Although DEX is a long-established generic, LDX was granted marketing authorization as a New Active Substance due to its distinct safety and efficacy profile. The CJEU must determine if such derivatives constitute separate active substances un...
core_points_zh: CJEU被要求裁定已获批活性成分的前药在欧盟是否可独立获得SPC保护
案件背景涉及武田的LDX及其母体药物DEX，争议在于前药是否构成不同的活性物质
裁决结果旨在为制药行业提供法律确定性，并解决该领域的现有诉讼争议
core_points_en: CJEU referral C-794/25 addresses whether pro-drugs of known actives can secure independent SPC protection in the EU.
Lisdexamfetamine was authorized as a New Active Substance despite being a metabolic derivative of older drug dexamphetamine.
The ruling will interpret Article 10.2.b of the Medicinal Products Directive regarding significant differences in safety or efficacy.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案核心在于解释《药品指令》中关于活性物质衍生的定义。若CJEU认定前药可独立获SPC，将显著延长创新药的市场独占期；反之则可能限制基于已知分子结构的改良型创新的专利策略。企业需密切关注判决对SPC申请策略的影响。
report_items.insight_en: This referral highlights critical uncertainties in defining 'active substance' for SPC purposes when dealing with molecular derivatives. The outcome will significantly impact portfolio strategies for lifecycle management and second-generation medicines. Rights holders must assess how the court balances regulatory definitions of New Active Substances against the strict requirements for SPC eligibility under Regulation...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性
Practice note/实务观察
What to monitor/后续观察
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Determines potential for extending market exclusivity via SPCs for improved formulations of legacy drugs.
Practice note: Evaluate if derivative compounds meet the threshold for differing significantly in safety or efficacy profiles.
What to monitor: Watch for the CJEU's interpretation of 'different salts, esters, ethers' versus distinct active substances in SPC contexts.

report_items.title_zh: 德国商标申请中的恶意注册：企业日益增长的风险
report_items.title_en: German Bad Faith Trademark Filings: DPMA Warns of Rising Strategic Abuse Risks
report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has highlighted a significant increase in potentially bad-faith trademark applications since mid-2025. These filings often target signs already used by third parties without formal protection, aiming to exert competitive pressure rather than indicate commercial origin. The DPMA attributes this trend to technological developments, such as AI tools facilitating the identification of unregistered signs, and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms that allow swift blocking of third parties. Under the German Trademark Act (MarkenG), applications file...
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
core_points_en: DPMA reports a surge in bad-faith filings targeting unregistered signs used by third parties for strategic leverage.
AI tools and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms facilitate rapid identification and blocking of competitors.
German law excludes registration or allows invalidation of marks filed without genuine intent to use.
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
report_items.insight_en: This development underscores the increasing scrutiny of applicant intent in German practice, aligning with broader EU trends. Rights holders must recognize that mere registration is no longer an absolute shield against challenges based on bad faith. Proactive portfolio management is essential to mitigate risks associated with strategic filings designed to disrupt market access or extract undue advantages through enfo...
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险
遭遇恶意指控时，应积极收集在先使用证据，依法提起无效宣告以维权
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Early registration remains critical to secure rights, but businesses must also prepare defenses against bad-faith challenges.
Practice note: Monitor new filings closely to identify potential bad-faith applications targeting existing unregistered signs.
What to monitor: Watch for DPMA guidance and Federal Court of Justice case law refining the definition of bad faith in digital contexts.

report_items.title_zh: UPC官方2025年度回顾：五大亮点解析
report_items.title_en: UPC Annual Review 2025: Five Key Highlights from the Court's Second Official Report
report_items.title: Official UPC Year in Review – Five highlights from 2025
report_items.summary_zh: Bristows律所发布分析，解读统一专利法院（UPC）发布的2025年官方年度回顾报告。该报告是UPC的第二份年度报告，全面梳理了2025年的机构活动、案件趋势及运营发展。文章从中提炼出五个对UPC用户至关重要的亮点，旨在帮助利益相关者更好地理解UPC的最新动态与司法实践走向，为在欧专利诉讼策略提供参考依据。
report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has published its second official Annual Review, detailing institutional activity, case trends, and operational developments throughout 2025. Bristows analyzes this report, extracting five specific highlights deemed most relevant for UPC users. This overview provides essential context on the court's evolving practices and statistical performance during its second full year of operation.
core_points_zh: UPC发布第二份官方年度回顾，全面展示2025年机构活动与案件趋势
报告详细分析了UPC的运营发展状况，为法律从业者提供关键数据支持
文章提炼五大核心亮点，聚焦对UPC用户最具参考价值的实务动态
core_points_en: The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's activities in 2025.
Bristows identifies five key highlights from the report that provide critical insights into current case trends and procedural developments.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This annual review serves as a primary reference for understanding the UPC's operational trajectory and judicial tendencies. Rights holders and legal teams should examine these highlights to align their European patent enforcement expectations with the court's actual caseload management and procedural evolution.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The report offers data-driven insights into UPC activity levels, helping rights holders contextualize litigation timelines and court capacity.
Practice note: Legal practitioners should review the identified highlights to stay updated on emerging procedural norms and case management trends within the UPC.
What to monitor: Future updates to the UPC's annual reporting will likely continue to shape expectations regarding case volume distribution and operational efficiency.

report_items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解
report_items.title_en: Strategic Planning for Successful IP Mediation Amidst New European ADR Frameworks
report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，成为解决IP纠纷的优选。WIPO数据显示2025年案件激增42%，中小企业占比高。欧盟层面，EUIPO扩大调解服务范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解中心。调解由中立专家主持，灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供法院无法给予的商业解决方案，有助于建立双赢局面。
report_items.summary_en: Mediation offers a confidential, cost-effective alternative to litigation for resolving intellectual property disputes, particularly benefiting SMEs and individuals. The World Intellectual Property Organization reported a 42% increase in administered cases in 2025, with significant participation from non-corporate entities. In Europe, the landscape is expanding with the EUIPO Mediation Centre extending its services to all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and designs as of June 2025. Furthermore, the Unified Patent Court will inaugurate its Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in J...
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
core_points_en: WIPO recorded a 42% rise in IP mediation cases in 2025, with SMEs and individuals comprising 59% of involved parties.
The EUIPO Mediation Centre expanded its scope in June 2025 to cover all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and registered designs.
The Unified Patent Court will launch its Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in June 2026, enhancing European ADR options.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
report_items.insight_en: The expansion of institutional mediation frameworks in Europe provides rights holders with structured avenues to resolve cross-border IP conflicts efficiently. For portfolio managers and legal teams, integrating these mechanisms can facilitate commercially focused settlements that courts may not offer. Understanding the procedural nuances of WIPO, EUIPO, and upcoming UPC facilities allows parties to leverage confiden...
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Institutional mediation offers confidential, commercially oriented resolutions for IP disputes, reducing reliance on public litigation.
Practice note: Consider incorporating mandatory mediation clauses in commercial agreements to utilize EUIPO and future UPC dispute resolution services.
What to monitor: Track the operational rollout of the UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre scheduled for June 2026.

report_items.title_zh: 英国上诉法院就选择性分销体系在线限制发布指引
report_items.title_en: UK Court of Appeal Clarifies Online Sales Restrictions in Selective Distribution Systems
report_items.title: UK Court of Appeal issues guidance on online restrictions in selective distribution systems
report_items.summary_zh: 英国上诉法院在Deckers诉Up & Running案中裁定，品牌方禁止授权零售商在未品牌折扣网站销售不违反竞争法，推翻竞争上诉法庭原判。法院确认此类在线限制需结合法律与经济背景评估损害程度，而非自动违法。此举虽未放松对转售价格维持等核心限制的执法，但强调品牌应建立透明、客观的分销标准以规避诉讼风险。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Court of Appeal overturned a Competition Appeal Tribunal ruling, holding that Deckers did not breach competition law by preventing an authorised retailer from selling on an unbranded discount website. The judgment confirms that restrictions on online channels within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal. Instead, they require a careful assessment of legal and economic context to establish a sufficient degree of harm, aligning with established case law such as Coty. While this clarifies the treatment of channel restrictions, it does not signal leniency towards hard...
core_points_zh: 在线销售限制非自动违法，需个案评估法律经济背景及损害程度
上诉法院推翻初审判决，支持品牌方管控未品牌折扣渠道的合规性
企业应避免价格固定等核心限制，通过透明标准降低反垄断诉讼风险
core_points_en: Restrictions on online sales channels in selective distribution are not presumed illegal but require contextual analysis of harm.
The Court of Appeal ruled that banning sales on unbranded discount websites by authorised retailers does not inherently breach competition law.
Hardcore restrictions such as resale price maintenance and blanket online bans remain strictly prohibited under current enforcement standards.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国出口欧洲的品牌商需警惕选择性分销中的在线限制合规性。建议避免直接禁止线上销售或固定价格，转而制定基于品牌形象和防止搭便车的客观准入标准。完善合同条款与证据留存，可有效应对潜在的反垄断调查与民事诉讼，保障供应链稳定。
report_items.insight_en: This decision provides important clarity for brands operating selective distribution networks in the UK and EU. It reinforces that channel architecture controls can be lawful if justified by brand positioning or network integrity, rather than being treated as per se violations. However, rights holders must distinguish these legitimate quality controls from hardcore anti-competitive practices. Maintaining transparent...
insight_points_zh: 制定基于品牌定位的客观分销标准，避免 blanket ban 线上销售
严禁转售价格维持等核心限制，完善合规文档以应对反垄断审查
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands can defend channel restrictions by demonstrating they protect brand image and prevent free-riding, avoiding automatic illegality findings.
Practice note: Document transparent, objective criteria for selective distribution models, specifically regarding website standards and third-party marketplace usage.
What to monitor: Continued enforcement actions against resale price maintenance and online sales restrictions by the European Commission and national competition authorities.

report_items.title_zh: 瑞士通过专利法修订引入实质审查制度
report_items.title_en: Switzerland Reforms Patent Act with Mandatory Searches and Optional Substantive Examination
report_items.title: Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform
report_items.summary_zh: 2024年3月，瑞士联邦议会通过《专利法》部分修订案。此次改革核心在于引入强制性的现有技术检索，并允许申请人选择是否进行全面的实质审查。此外，新规接受英文技术文件，并建立了新的上诉系统。这一变革标志着瑞士从形式审查向更严格的审查模式转变，旨在提升专利质量与法律确定性，对在该国进行专利布局的企业将产生深远影响。
report_items.summary_en: In March 2024, the Swiss Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing significant procedural changes. Key amendments include the implementation of a mandatory prior-art search and an optional full substantive examination system. The reform also allows for the acceptance of English-language technical documents and establishes a new appeal mechanism. These measures mark a shift towards enhanced patent quality and legal certainty within the Swiss jurisdiction.
core_points_zh: 瑞士联邦议会于2024年3月通过《专利法》部分修订案
引入强制性现有技术检索及可选的全面实质审查机制
接受英文技术文档并建立全新的专利上诉系统
core_points_en: The revised Swiss Patent Act introduces a mandatory prior-art search requirement for all patent applications filed in Switzerland.
Applicants may now opt for a full substantive examination, moving beyond the previous formal examination framework.
The reform permits the submission of English-language technical documents and implements a new appellate structure.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业赴瑞士申请专利需适应新流程，强制检索可能增加前期成本与时间。建议提前规划现有技术分析，利用英文文件便利降低翻译成本。同时，关注实质审查的可选性，根据商业价值权衡投入，以应对更高的授权门槛和潜在的驳回风险。
report_items.insight_en: This legislative update alters the procedural landscape for patent registration in Switzerland. Rights holders should note the introduction of mandatory searches and the option for substantive review, which may impact prosecution timelines and grant probabilities. The acceptance of English documentation offers potential administrative efficiencies for international applicants managing European portfolios.
insight_points_zh: 适应强制检索要求，优化前期现有技术分析与预算规划
善用英文文件政策降低成本，审慎评估实质审查的商业必要性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how the optional substantive examination affects grant rates and portfolio strength in the Swiss market.
Practice note: Leverage the new allowance for English-language technical documents to streamline filing procedures where applicable.
What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline and specific guidelines for the newly established appeal system.

report_items.title: FRAND battle between Huawei and TP-Link now focused at UK High Court

report_items.summary_en: Huawei has withdrawn its patent infringement claims against TP-Link at the Unified Patent Court (UPC) and the Munich Regional Court. The multi-jurisdictional dispute concerning Wi-Fi 6 technology now centers exclusively on FRAND rate-setting proceedings before the UK High Court. This strategic shift follows a recent determination by Mr Justice Richard Meade regarding an interim licence rate. Huawei originally initiated parallel litigation in summer 2025 across the UPC's Munich local division, German national courts, and Chinese courts. The withdrawal of continental European infringement action...

英国高等法院法官Richard Meade已确定涉案Wi-Fi 6技术的临时许可费率
华为曾于2025年夏在UPC慕尼黑分部及中国法院对TP-Link提起平行诉讼
core_points_en: Huawei withdrew infringement claims against TP-Link at the UPC and Munich Regional Court after UK interim rate setting.
The dispute over Wi-Fi 6 standard essential patents now focuses solely on FRAND proceedings at the UK High Court.
Parallel litigation continues in Chinese courts, while European enforcement actions have been discontinued by Huawei.

report_items.insight_en: This development highlights the continued strategic importance of the UK High Court in global FRAND determinations. Rights holders may prioritize jurisdictions offering robust rate-setting mechanisms to establish licensing benchmarks, subsequently withdrawing parallel infringement actions in other regions once interim rates are secured. For implementers, this underscores the need to closely monitor UK judicial outcom...

Practice note/实务观察: 权利人在获得有利费率裁定后撤回侵权诉讼是常见策略
What to monitor/后续观察: 关注英国最终FRAND判决结果及华为在其他…
insight_points_en: Client relevance: SEP implementers should assess how UK interim rate rulings influence global negotiation leverage and potential settlement terms.
Practice note: Rights holders may consolidate litigation strategies around forums providing definitive rate-setting capabilities after securing interim measures.
What to monitor: The final FRAND judgment from the UK High Court and any subsequent enforcement or licensing activities in remaining jurisdictions like China.

report_items.summary_en: The Munich Regional Court has confirmed that Nokia withdrew its patent infringement lawsuit against Geely, which was scheduled for an oral hearing on May 21, 2026. The action concerned two European patents essential to 4G and 5G standards used in connected vehicles (EP 3 566 488 and EP 3 832 976). This withdrawal halts the immediate proceedings in Munich and suggests that parallel litigation efforts, including those potentially pending at the Unified Patent Court (UPC), may also conclude prematurely without a substantive judgment on the merits.

The dispute centered on two standard-essential patents (EP 3 566 488 and EP 3 832 976) relevant to 4G and 5G connectivity in automobiles.
The withdrawal indicates a potential early resolution of this specific enforcement wave, possibly affecting related UPC proceedings.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案撤诉标志着新一轮车联网专利诉讼浪潮尚未全面展开即告一段落。实务中需关注诺基亚与吉利是否达成和解或许可协议，以及该撤诉对UPC相关并行案件的具体影响。

report_items.title_zh: 华硕加入Sisvel Wi-Fi专利池结束诉讼
report_items.title_en: Asus Licenses Sisvel Wi-Fi Pool, Ending Litigation with Huawei and Philips
report_items.title: Asus signs up to Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, ending litigation
report_items.summary_zh: 华硕获得Sisvel Wi-Fi多模专利池许可，涵盖Wi-Fi 6和7标准必要专利。此举结束了华硕与华为、飞利浦及Wilus之间的未决专利诉讼。Sisvel未披露财务条款。此前，慕尼黑地区法院在Wilus诉华硕案中澄清了FRAND程序方法，表示将更严格审查FRAND报价的合规性。
report_items.summary_en: Asus has secured a license to the standard essential patents within Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, covering Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 technologies. This agreement resolves pending patent litigation between the electronics manufacturer and pool members Huawei, Philips, and Wilus. The deal adds Asus to a roster of existing licensees that includes Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Panasonic, Sony Group Corporation, and ZTE. While Sisvel confirmed the resolution of disputes in venues such as the Munich Regional Court, the financial terms of the licensing arrangement remain undisclosed.

Sisvel未披露协议财务条款，华硕加入HPE、华为等现有被许可人名单
慕尼黑地区法院在相关案件中明确将更严格审查FRAND报价的合规性
core_points_en: Asus obtained a license for Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, covering SEPs for Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 standards.
The agreement terminates ongoing patent disputes between Asus and pool members Huawei, Philips, and Wilus.
Munich Regional Court recently clarified its approach to examining FRAND compliance in related proceedings.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This settlement highlights the continued effectiveness of patent pools in resolving multi-jurisdictional SEP disputes without public disclosure of financial terms. For rights holders and implementers, the timing of this deal coincides with evolving judicial scrutiny regarding FRAND offer compliance in key European venues. The resolution suggests that major manufacturers are increasingly opting for pool licenses to mi...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how joining established pools impacts litigation risk management for SEP implementers in Europe.
Practice note: Note the Munich Regional Court's stated intent to closely examine FRAND compliance in future judgments.
What to monitor: Track whether other major electronics manufacturers follow suit by licensing Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode program.

daily_report.executive_line_en: European IP enforcement is balancing stricter judicial evidence standards with a strategic pivot toward FRAND rate-setting and licensing settlements in the automotive sector.
daily_report.summary_en: The European IP landscape is characterized by heightened procedural rigor in litigation alongside a commercial shift toward negotiated resolutions. The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Hague Division has established strict cumulative conditions for evidence production orders, significantly raising the threshold for provisional measures and requiring precise proportionality arguments from rights holders. Concurrently, Standard Essential Patent (SEP) disputes in the automotive and telecommunications sectors are de-escalating through global settlements rather than prolonged infringement trials. Major licensors, including Nokia and Huawei, have withdrawn parallel actions in favor of focusing on FRAND rate determinations in UK courts or securing pool licenses, as seen with Asus joining the Sisvel Wi-Fi pool. In competition law, the UK Court of Appeal clarified that online sales restrictions within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal, while the Competition Appeal Tribunal dismissed a major collective action against Qualcomm due to evidentiary gaps. Meanwhile, authorities in Germany and at the EUIPO are warning of increased bad-faith trademark filings facilitated by AI...
what_changed_vs_last_window_en: UPC Hague explicitly defined four cumulative conditions for evidence preservation, concretizing procedural thresholds.
Automotive SEP disputes show a concentrated trend toward global settlements and pool licensing rather than trial progression.
UK courts issued significant guidance on the legality of online distribution restrictions and evidentiary requirements for antitrust claims.
next_watch_72h_en: Monitor CJEU referral C-794/25 regarding SPC eligibility for pro-drugs of previously approved active ingredients.
Track progress of Huawei-TP-Link FRAND rate determination at the UK High Court and its global licensing implications.
Observe initial antitrust compliance cases involving patent pools under the revised TTBER framework.
key_moves_en: UPC Hague tightened standards for issuing evidence production orders.
Nokia and Geely reached a global 5G patent settlement, leading to case withdrawals.
Asus joined the Sisvel Wi-Fi patent pool, resolving long-standing litigation with Huawei and Philips.
UK Court of Appeal established criteria for assessing the legality of online sales restrictions.

weekly_report.headline_zh: UPC证据门槛确立，SEP和解潮起
weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Evidence Rules Set; SEP Settlements Surge
weekly_report.executive_line: 本周UPC明确证据保全严苛标准，重塑维权预期；同时诺基亚、华为等巨头密集达成SEP和解或撤诉，显示FRAND博弈从诉讼对抗转向商业妥协。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 欧洲IP局势呈现“司法收紧”与“商业缓和”并行的结构性特征。统一专利法院（UPC）海牙分部确立证据保全四项累积条件，大幅提高取证门槛，迫使权利人调整策略。与此同时，标准必要专利（SEP）领域出现显著降温迹象，诺基亚撤回对吉利诉讼并达成全球和解，华硕加入Sisvel专利池，华为聚焦英国FRAND费率裁定。此外，欧盟修订版TTBER生效，为技术许可提供新反垄断指引；德国严打AI辅助恶意商标抢注。整体而言，企业需适应更严格的程序规则，并利用和解窗口优化许可成本。

report_items.title_zh: UPC海牙分部：证据保全令需满足四项累积条件
report_items.title_en: UPC Hague: Evidence Production Orders Require Cumulative Conditions and Proportionality
report_items.title: LD The Hague, May 11, 2026, Order, UPC-CFI_478/2025, UPC_CFI_585/2026
report_items.summary_zh: UPC海牙地方法院裁定，依据《程序规则》第190条及《统一专利法院协定》第59(1)条，发布证据保全令需满足四项累积条件：初步证据、对方控制下的特定证据、保密保护及比例原则。法院援引Winnow v Orbisk等先例，指出已授权欧洲专利具有有效性推定，除非明显无效。鉴于侵权验证需物理测试，法院批准获取部分产品样本及营销材料，但基于比例原则缩减了样本数量。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in The Hague clarified the requirements for evidence production orders under Rule 190 of the Rules of Procedure and Article 59(1) of the Unified Patent Court Agreement. The Court established that four cumulative conditions must be met: plausible evidence, specified evidence within the opposing party's control, confidentiality protection, and proportionality. Citing Winnow v Orbisk and Oppo v Panasonic, the judgment affirmed that granted European patents carry a presumption of validity, which is only displaced by clear-cut invalidity. The Court reduced the requested physi...
core_points_zh: 证据保全令需满足初步证据、特定性、保密性及比例原则四项累积条件
已授权欧洲专利享有有效性推定，仅明显无效情形可推翻该推定
为验证依赖测试的侵权，可下令提供物理样本，但需符合比例原则限制范围
core_points_en: Rule 190 RoP and Article 59(1) UPCA require plausible evidence, specific controlled evidence, confidentiality, and proportionality.
Granted European patents benefit from a validity presumption unless a clear-cut case of invalidity is demonstrated at this stage.
Physical samples may be ordered for necessary testing, but requests are strictly limited by proportionality principles.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC在证据保全阶段的审查标准，强调了对已授权专利有效性的尊重及比例原则的适用。实务中，申请人需确保证据请求的具体性与必要性，避免过度索取。对于依赖物理测试认定侵权的案件，提前规划测试方案并论证样本获取的必要性至关重要。
report_items.insight_en: This decision reinforces the structured approach of the UPC towards pre-trial evidence gathering, balancing the rights holder's need to verify infringement against the defendant's interest in avoiding disproportionate burdens. It confirms that while patent validity is presumed, the specificity and necessity of requested evidence remain subject to rigorous judicial scrutiny. For practitioners, the ruling highlights th...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: 明确UPC证据保全门槛，指导专利维权策略
Practice note/实务观察: 论证样本获取必要性时需结合具体测试需求与比例原则
What to monitor/后续观察: 关注UPC对“明显无效”标准的进一步界定及…
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clarifies the high threshold for obtaining evidence production orders, requiring precise justification of necessity and proportionality.
Practice note: When seeking physical samples for test-dependent infringement, limit requests to the minimum viable set to satisfy proportionality requirements.
What to monitor: How the UPC further defines 'clear-cut' invalidity cases that might displace the presumption of validity during evidence stages.

report_items.title_zh: CJEU需裁定：前药是否可独立获得SPC保护？
report_items.title_en: CJEU Asked to Rule on SPC Eligibility for Pro-Drugs of Previously Approved Actives
report_items.title: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟法院（CJEU）受理新案件（C-794/25），需裁定已获批活性成分的前药能否独立获得欧盟SPC保护。背景涉及武田的LDX（右旋苯丙胺前药），其虽获新药上市许可，但母体药物DEX早已上市。争议焦点在于前药是否被视为“不同”的活性物质，该裁决将澄清行业规则并解决相关诉讼。
report_items.summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) has received a new referral (Case C-794/25) concerning whether an approved pro-drug of a previously authorized active pharmaceutical ingredient qualifies for Supplementary Protection Certificate (SPC) protection independently. The case centers on lisdexamfetamine (LDX), a pro-drug of dexamphetamine (DEX). Although DEX is a long-established generic, LDX was granted marketing authorization as a New Active Substance due to its distinct safety and efficacy profile. The CJEU must determine if such derivatives constitute separate active substances un...
core_points_zh: CJEU被要求裁定已获批活性成分的前药在欧盟是否可独立获得SPC保护
案件背景涉及武田的LDX及其母体药物DEX，争议在于前药是否构成不同的活性物质
裁决结果旨在为制药行业提供法律确定性，并解决该领域的现有诉讼争议
core_points_en: CJEU referral C-794/25 addresses whether pro-drugs of known actives can secure independent SPC protection in the EU.
Lisdexamfetamine was authorized as a New Active Substance despite being a metabolic derivative of older drug dexamphetamine.
The ruling will interpret Article 10.2.b of the Medicinal Products Directive regarding significant differences in safety or efficacy.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案核心在于解释《药品指令》中关于活性物质衍生的定义。若CJEU认定前药可独立获SPC，将显著延长创新药的市场独占期；反之则可能限制基于已知分子结构的改良型创新的专利策略。企业需密切关注判决对SPC申请策略的影响。
report_items.insight_en: This referral highlights critical uncertainties in defining 'active substance' for SPC purposes when dealing with molecular derivatives. The outcome will significantly impact portfolio strategies for lifecycle management and second-generation medicines. Rights holders must assess how the court balances regulatory definitions of New Active Substances against the strict requirements for SPC eligibility under Regulation...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性
Practice note/实务观察
What to monitor/后续观察
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Determines potential for extending market exclusivity via SPCs for improved formulations of legacy drugs.
Practice note: Evaluate if derivative compounds meet the threshold for differing significantly in safety or efficacy profiles.
What to monitor: Watch for the CJEU's interpretation of 'different salts, esters, ethers' versus distinct active substances in SPC contexts.

report_items.title_en: German Bad Faith Trademark Filings: DPMA Warns of Rising Strategic Abuse Risks
report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has highlighted a significant increase in potentially bad-faith trademark applications since mid-2025. These filings often target signs already used by third parties without formal protection, aiming to exert competitive pressure rather than indicate commercial origin. The DPMA attributes this trend to technological developments, such as AI tools facilitating the identification of unregistered signs, and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms that allow swift blocking of third parties. Under the German Trademark Act (MarkenG), applications file...
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
core_points_en: DPMA reports a surge in bad-faith filings targeting unregistered signs used by third parties for strategic leverage.
AI tools and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms facilitate rapid identification and blocking of competitors.
German law excludes registration or allows invalidation of marks filed without genuine intent to use.
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
report_items.insight_en: This development underscores the increasing scrutiny of applicant intent in German practice, aligning with broader EU trends. Rights holders must recognize that mere registration is no longer an absolute shield against challenges based on bad faith. Proactive portfolio management is essential to mitigate risks associated with strategic filings designed to disrupt market access or extract undue advantages through enfo...
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险
遭遇恶意指控时，应积极收集在先使用证据，依法提起无效宣告以维权
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Early registration remains critical to secure rights, but businesses must also prepare defenses against bad-faith challenges.
Practice note: Monitor new filings closely to identify potential bad-faith applications targeting existing unregistered signs.
What to monitor: Watch for DPMA guidance and Federal Court of Justice case law refining the definition of bad faith in digital contexts.

report_items.title_zh: UPC官方2025年度回顾：五大亮点解析
report_items.title_en: UPC Annual Review 2025: Five Key Highlights from the Court's Second Official Report
report_items.title: Official UPC Year in Review – Five highlights from 2025
report_items.summary_zh: Bristows律所发布分析，解读统一专利法院（UPC）发布的2025年官方年度回顾报告。该报告是UPC的第二份年度报告，全面梳理了2025年的机构活动、案件趋势及运营发展。文章从中提炼出五个对UPC用户至关重要的亮点，旨在帮助利益相关者更好地理解UPC的最新动态与司法实践走向，为在欧专利诉讼策略提供参考依据。
report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has published its second official Annual Review, detailing institutional activity, case trends, and operational developments throughout 2025. Bristows analyzes this report, extracting five specific highlights deemed most relevant for UPC users. This overview provides essential context on the court's evolving practices and statistical performance during its second full year of operation.
core_points_zh: UPC发布第二份官方年度回顾，全面展示2025年机构活动与案件趋势
报告详细分析了UPC的运营发展状况，为法律从业者提供关键数据支持
文章提炼五大核心亮点，聚焦对UPC用户最具参考价值的实务动态
core_points_en: The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's activities in 2025.
Bristows identifies five key highlights from the report that provide critical insights into current case trends and procedural developments.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This annual review serves as a primary reference for understanding the UPC's operational trajectory and judicial tendencies. Rights holders and legal teams should examine these highlights to align their European patent enforcement expectations with the court's actual caseload management and procedural evolution.

report_items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解
report_items.title_en: Strategic Planning for Successful IP Mediation Amidst New European ADR Frameworks
report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，成为解决IP纠纷的优选。WIPO数据显示2025年案件激增42%，中小企业占比高。欧盟层面，EUIPO扩大调解服务范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解中心。调解由中立专家主持，灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供法院无法给予的商业解决方案，有助于建立双赢局面。
report_items.summary_en: Mediation offers a confidential, cost-effective alternative to litigation for resolving intellectual property disputes, particularly benefiting SMEs and individuals. The World Intellectual Property Organization reported a 42% increase in administered cases in 2025, with significant participation from non-corporate entities. In Europe, the landscape is expanding with the EUIPO Mediation Centre extending its services to all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and designs as of June 2025. Furthermore, the Unified Patent Court will inaugurate its Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in J...
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
core_points_en: WIPO recorded a 42% rise in IP mediation cases in 2025, with SMEs and individuals comprising 59% of involved parties.
The EUIPO Mediation Centre expanded its scope in June 2025 to cover all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and registered designs.
The Unified Patent Court will launch its Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in June 2026, enhancing European ADR options.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
report_items.insight_en: The expansion of institutional mediation frameworks in Europe provides rights holders with structured avenues to resolve cross-border IP conflicts efficiently. For portfolio managers and legal teams, integrating these mechanisms can facilitate commercially focused settlements that courts may not offer. Understanding the procedural nuances of WIPO, EUIPO, and upcoming UPC facilities allows parties to leverage confiden...
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Institutional mediation offers confidential, commercially oriented resolutions for IP disputes, reducing reliance on public litigation.
Practice note: Consider incorporating mandatory mediation clauses in commercial agreements to utilize EUIPO and future UPC dispute resolution services.
What to monitor: Track the operational rollout of the UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre scheduled for June 2026.

report_items.title_zh: 英国上诉法院就选择性分销体系在线限制发布指引
report_items.title_en: UK Court of Appeal Clarifies Online Sales Restrictions in Selective Distribution Systems
report_items.title: UK Court of Appeal issues guidance on online restrictions in selective distribution systems
report_items.summary_zh: 英国上诉法院在Deckers诉Up & Running案中裁定，品牌方禁止授权零售商在未品牌折扣网站销售不违反竞争法，推翻竞争上诉法庭原判。法院确认此类在线限制需结合法律与经济背景评估损害程度，而非自动违法。此举虽未放松对转售价格维持等核心限制的执法，但强调品牌应建立透明、客观的分销标准以规避诉讼风险。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Court of Appeal overturned a Competition Appeal Tribunal ruling, holding that Deckers did not breach competition law by preventing an authorised retailer from selling on an unbranded discount website. The judgment confirms that restrictions on online channels within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal. Instead, they require a careful assessment of legal and economic context to establish a sufficient degree of harm, aligning with established case law such as Coty. While this clarifies the treatment of channel restrictions, it does not signal leniency towards hard...
core_points_zh: 在线销售限制非自动违法，需个案评估法律经济背景及损害程度
上诉法院推翻初审判决，支持品牌方管控未品牌折扣渠道的合规性
企业应避免价格固定等核心限制，通过透明标准降低反垄断诉讼风险
core_points_en: Restrictions on online sales channels in selective distribution are not presumed illegal but require contextual analysis of harm.
The Court of Appeal ruled that banning sales on unbranded discount websites by authorised retailers does not inherently breach competition law.
Hardcore restrictions such as resale price maintenance and blanket online bans remain strictly prohibited under current enforcement standards.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国出口欧洲的品牌商需警惕选择性分销中的在线限制合规性。建议避免直接禁止线上销售或固定价格，转而制定基于品牌形象和防止搭便车的客观准入标准。完善合同条款与证据留存，可有效应对潜在的反垄断调查与民事诉讼，保障供应链稳定。
report_items.insight_en: This decision provides important clarity for brands operating selective distribution networks in the UK and EU. It reinforces that channel architecture controls can be lawful if justified by brand positioning or network integrity, rather than being treated as per se violations. However, rights holders must distinguish these legitimate quality controls from hardcore anti-competitive practices. Maintaining transparent...
insight_points_zh: 制定基于品牌定位的客观分销标准，避免 blanket ban 线上销售
严禁转售价格维持等核心限制，完善合规文档以应对反垄断审查
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands can defend channel restrictions by demonstrating they protect brand image and prevent free-riding, avoiding automatic illegality findings.
Practice note: Document transparent, objective criteria for selective distribution models, specifically regarding website standards and third-party marketplace usage.
What to monitor: Continued enforcement actions against resale price maintenance and online sales restrictions by the European Commission and national competition authorities.

report_items.title_zh: 瑞士通过专利法修订引入实质审查制度
report_items.title_en: Switzerland Reforms Patent Act with Mandatory Searches and Optional Substantive Examination
report_items.title: Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform
report_items.summary_zh: 2024年3月，瑞士联邦议会通过《专利法》部分修订案。此次改革核心在于引入强制性的现有技术检索，并允许申请人选择是否进行全面的实质审查。此外，新规接受英文技术文件，并建立了新的上诉系统。这一变革标志着瑞士从形式审查向更严格的审查模式转变，旨在提升专利质量与法律确定性，对在该国进行专利布局的企业将产生深远影响。
report_items.summary_en: In March 2024, the Swiss Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing significant procedural changes. Key amendments include the implementation of a mandatory prior-art search and an optional full substantive examination system. The reform also allows for the acceptance of English-language technical documents and establishes a new appeal mechanism. These measures mark a shift towards enhanced patent quality and legal certainty within the Swiss jurisdiction.
core_points_zh: 瑞士联邦议会于2024年3月通过《专利法》部分修订案
引入强制性现有技术检索及可选的全面实质审查机制
接受英文技术文档并建立全新的专利上诉系统
core_points_en: The revised Swiss Patent Act introduces a mandatory prior-art search requirement for all patent applications filed in Switzerland.
Applicants may now opt for a full substantive examination, moving beyond the previous formal examination framework.
The reform permits the submission of English-language technical documents and implements a new appellate structure.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业赴瑞士申请专利需适应新流程，强制检索可能增加前期成本与时间。建议提前规划现有技术分析，利用英文文件便利降低翻译成本。同时，关注实质审查的可选性，根据商业价值权衡投入，以应对更高的授权门槛和潜在的驳回风险。
report_items.insight_en: This legislative update alters the procedural landscape for patent registration in Switzerland. Rights holders should note the introduction of mandatory searches and the option for substantive review, which may impact prosecution timelines and grant probabilities. The acceptance of English documentation offers potential administrative efficiencies for international applicants managing European portfolios.
insight_points_zh: 适应强制检索要求，优化前期现有技术分析与预算规划
善用英文文件政策降低成本，审慎评估实质审查的商业必要性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how the optional substantive examination affects grant rates and portfolio strength in the Swiss market.
Practice note: Leverage the new allowance for English-language technical documents to streamline filing procedures where applicable.
What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline and specific guidelines for the newly established appeal system.

The action concerned two European patents essential to 4G and 5G standards used in connected vehicles (EP 3 566 488 and EP 3 832 976). This withdrawal halts the immediate proceedings in Munich and suggests that parallel litigation efforts, including those potentially pending at the Unified Patent Court (UPC), may also conclude prematurely without a substantive judgment on the merits.

report_items.summary_zh: 华硕获得Sisvel Wi-Fi多模专利池许可，涵盖Wi-Fi 6和7标准必要专利。此举结束了华硕与华为、飞利浦及Wilus之间的未决专利诉讼。Sisvel未披露财务条款。此前，慕尼黑地区法院在Wilus诉华硕案中澄清了FRAND程序方法，表示将更严格审查FRAND报价的合规性。
report_items.summary_en: Asus has secured a license to the standard essential patents within Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, covering Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 technologies. This agreement resolves pending patent litigation between the electronics manufacturer and pool members Huawei, Philips, and Wilus. The deal adds Asus to a roster of existing licensees that includes Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Panasonic, Sony Group Corporation, and ZTE. While Sisvel confirmed the resolution of disputes in venues such as the Munich Regional Court, the financial terms of the licensing arrangement remain undisclosed.

core_points_en: Asus obtained a license for Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, covering SEPs for Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 standards.
The agreement terminates ongoing patent disputes between Asus and pool members Huawei, Philips, and Wilus.
Munich Regional Court recently clarified its approach to examining FRAND compliance in related proceedings.

daily_audio_latest.headline_zh: UPC证据门槛明确，车企SEP诉讼现和解潮
daily_audio_latest.headline_en: UPC Tightens Evidence Rules; Auto SEP Disputes Shift to Settlements
daily_audio_latest.summary_zh: 欧洲IP战情呈现司法精细化与商业和解并行的态势。UPC海牙分部明确证据保全需满足四项累积条件，提高了维权取证门槛。与此同时，汽车与通信领域的SEP纠纷出现显著缓和迹象，诺基亚与吉利全球和解、华硕加入Sisvel专利池，表明行业正寻求通过FRAND费率裁定及许可协议解决争议。此外，英国法院在分销限制与反垄断索赔中释放明确合规信号，企业需警惕恶意商标抢注新风险。
daily_audio_latest.summary_en: The European IP landscape is characterized by heightened procedural rigor in litigation alongside a commercial shift toward negotiated resolutions. The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Hague Division has established strict cumulative conditions for evidence production orders, significantly raising the threshold for provisional measures and requiring precise proportionality arguments from rights holders. Concurrently, Standard Essential Patent (SEP) disputes in the automotive and telecommunications sectors are de-escalating through global settlements rather than prolonged infringement trials. Major licensors, including Nokia and Huawei, have withdrawn parallel actions in favor of focusing on FRAND rate determinations in UK courts or securing pool licenses, as seen with Asus joining the Sisvel Wi-Fi pool. In competition law, the UK Court of Appeal clarified that online sales restrictions within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal, while the Competition Appeal Tribunal dismissed a major collective action against Qualcomm due to evidentiary gaps. Meanwhile, authorities in Germany and at the EUIPO are warning of increased bad-faith trademark filings facilitated by AI...

transcript_lines_zh: 今天是2026年5月25日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，证据保全令需满足初步证据、特定性、保密性及比例原则四项累积条件。值得关注的是，Client relevance/客户相关性: 明确UPC证据保全门槛，指导专利维权策略。
再看第二条，CJEU被要求裁定已获批活性成分的前药在欧盟是否可独立获得SPC保护。值得关注的是，Client relevance/客户相关性。
再看第三条，德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击。值得关注的是，尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险。
最后看第四条，UPC发布第二份官方年度回顾，全面展示2025年机构活动与案件趋势。后续要看欧洲层面会不会出现进一步官方动作或配套安排。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕专利、商标、SEP标准必要专利展开，接下来值得继续关注CJEU关于前药活性成分认定的裁决动向。
transcript_lines_en: Today is May 25, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.

First, Rule 190 RoP and Article 59(1) UPCA require plausible evidence, specific controlled evidence, confidentiality, and propo. Why it matters: Clarifies the high threshold for obtaining evidence production orders, requiring precise justification of necessity and proportionality.

Next, CJEU referral C-794/25 addresses whether pro-drugs of known actives can secure independent SPC protection in the EU. Why it matters: Determines potential for extending market exclusivity via SPCs for improved formulations of legacy drugs.

Next, DPMA reports a surge in bad-faith filings targeting unregistered signs used by third parties for strategic leverage. Why it matters: Early registration remains critical to secure rights, but businesses must also prepare defenses against bad-faith challenges.

Finally, The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's. Why it matters: The report offers data-driven insights into UPC activity levels, helping rights holders contextualize litigation timelines and court ca.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on Patents, Trade marks, General IP. The next point to watch is Final FRAND rate ruling in the Huawei-TP-Link UK High Court proceedings.

Today is May 25, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.
First, Rule 190 RoP and Article 59(1) UPCA require plausible evidence, specific controlled evidence, confidentiality, and propo. Why it matters: Clarifies the high threshold for obtaining evidence production orders, requiring precise justification of necessity and proportionality.
Next, CJEU referral C-794/25 addresses whether pro-drugs of known actives can secure independent SPC protection in the EU. Why it matters: Determines potential for extending market exclusivity via SPCs for improved formulations of legacy drugs.
Next, DPMA reports a surge in bad-faith filings targeting unregistered signs used by third parties for strategic leverage. Why it matters: Early registration remains critical to secure rights, but businesses must also prepare defenses against bad-faith challenges.
Finally, The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's. Why it matters: The report offers data-driven insights into UPC activity levels, helping rights holders contextualize litigation timelines and court ca.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on Patents, Trade marks, General IP. The next point to watch is Final FRAND rate ruling in the Huawei-TP-Link UK High Court proceedings.

topics.headline_en: UPC Case Law Consolidation and PMAC Operational Launch
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，UPC通过年报及多项裁决加速判例法形成。赫尔辛基与杜塞尔多夫分院在等同原则、功能性限定及证据保全上确立严格标准；上诉庭明确程序合规红线。同时，PMAC程序规则获批并上线系统，提供调解仲裁新路径。企业需警惕单一专利地域限制及官网公示风险，利用ADR机制降低维权成本，优化在欧知识产权战略布局。
key_points: 司法实践趋严：等同判定采用累积要件，证据保全需满足四项条件，勘验后禁止补充专家意见。
程序合规高压：上诉期限自附理由判决日起算，错过期限仅极特殊情况可救济，撤诉退费新规落地。
替代争议解决：PMAC程序规则获批且系统上线，为SEP/FRAND纠纷提供官方调解仲裁渠道。
actions: 优化权利要求布局：避免过度使用功能性限定，排查单独销售组件的直接侵权风险。
强化程序管理：建立双重期限核查机制，谨慎处理应诉管辖节点，善用撤诉规则争取和解。
评估ADR策略：针对SEP纠纷优先评估PMAC调解可行性，降低诉讼时间与经济成本。
watchlist: 各地方分院早期判例对法律解释的潜在扭曲效应。
欧洲层面围绕PMAC后续配套安排及官方口径。
单一专利在新增成员国或特定缺口的效力认定动态。

Local Divisions in Helsinki and Düsseldorf established strict standards for equivalence assessments, functional claim limitations, and evidence preservation measures. The Court of Appeal clarified procedural compliance requirements, emphasizing that missing deadlines offers limited remedies. Concurrently, the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre adopted formal procedural rules and launched its digital case management system, providing structured pathways for mediation and arbitration. Rights holders must navigate the territorial constraints of unitary patent effects and monitor public registry disclosures. Procedural compliance pressure is high: Appeal periods run from the reasoned judgment date, with rare exceptions for missed deadlines; new withdrawal rules allow for fee reimbursem...
Alternative dispute resolution expansion: PMAC procedural rules are approved and its system is live, offering official mediation and arbitration channels specifically designed for...
actions_en: Optimize claim drafting strategies: Avoid excessive reliance on functional language to mitigate novelty risks, and assess direct infringement exposure for standalone components sol...
Strengthen procedural management protocols: Implement dual deadline verification systems, carefully manage jurisdictional response nodes, and utilize withdrawal mechanisms to facil...
Evaluate ADR engagement strategies: Prioritize feasibility assessments for PMAC mediation in standard-essential patent disputes to minimize litigation timelines and associated econ...
watchlist_en: Potential distortion effects of early local division precedents on broader legal interpretation and consistency.
Subsequent administrative arrangements and official guidance regarding PMAC operations at the European level.

topics.headline_zh: 欧洲SEP：英国定费率，UPC强禁令
topics.headline_en: UK Sets Global FRAND Rates; UPC Strengthens Injunctions
topics.summary_zh: 2025-2026年欧洲SEP格局剧变。英国法院确立全球FRAND费率裁定权（如三星诉中兴案），并倾向仲裁解决；统一专利法院（UPC）强化执法，签发反禁诉令对抗中国临时许可申请，并收紧FRAND抗辩门槛。监管方面，欧盟修订TTBER明确许可合规，UKIPO推进改革。车企与消费电子企业面临高额许可费与禁令双重风险，需重构全球谈判策略。
key_points: 英国司法主导：高院裁定全球FRAND费率（如3.92亿美元交叉许可），上诉法院确认含仲裁条款的要约可中止诉讼，确立“合同转向”。
UPC执法激进：曼海姆等分院签发反禁诉令（AASI）阻断中国法院临时许可程序，并认定未表达许可意愿者丧失FRAND抗辩权。
监管与和解并行：欧盟新TTBER细化专利池与集体谈判反垄断指南；Avanci/Sisvel专利池加速吸纳中国车企及电子厂商达成和解。
actions: 建立“许可意愿”快速响应机制：收到侵权通知须立即书面回应，避免在UPC或德国法院因程序瑕疵丧失FRAND抗辩资格。
调整管辖权策略：鉴于英国对全球费率的裁定力及UPC的禁令效率，优先通过仲裁或英国程序解决费率争议，规避德国双轨制风险。
评估专利池许可成本：针对车联网（Avanci）和Wi-Fi（Sisvel/Via）标准，提前测算加入专利池的成本效益，以批量许可替代个案诉讼。
watchlist: 英国最高法院关于特斯拉/InterDigital案的最终裁决，及其对全球FRAND管辖权的进一步界定。
UKIPO即将发布的SEP改革政策细则，特别是关于必要性审查和透明度要求的变化。
中美欧在SEP救济措施上的监管分歧，尤其是美国司法部对汽车专利联盟的反垄断调查进展。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The European standard-essential patent landscape is undergoing significant transformation between 2025 and 2026. UK courts have established authority to determine global FRAND rates, including cross-licensing arrangements, while increasingly favoring arbitration clauses to stay litigation. Concurrently, the Unified Patent Court is enforcing stricter procedural standards, issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions to protect enforcement proceedings and tightening the threshold for FRAND defenses by requiring immediate expressions of licensing willingness. Regulatory developments include updated EU guidelines on technology transfer and ongoing UK intellectual property office reforms aimed at enhancing transparency. Implementers in automotive and consumer electronics sectors face heightened risks of substantial licensing fees and injunctive relief. Strategic adaptation requires prioritizing arbitra...

The Unified Patent Court issues anti-anti-suit injunctions against foreign interim licenses and denies FRAND defenses to implementers who fail to promptly express willingness to li...
Regulatory frameworks are evolving with new EU antitrust guidance on patent pools and UK policy reforms targeting licensing transparency, while major patent pools accelerate settle...
actions_en: Establish rapid response protocols for infringement notices to document good-faith licensing willingness, preventing forfeiture of FRAND defenses in UPC or national court proceedin...
Prioritize arbitration or UK High Court proceedings for rate disputes to leverage definitive global rate-setting capabilities, thereby avoiding the risks associated with bifurcated...
Conduct early cost-benefit analyses for joining established patent pools, such as those for connectivity standards, to secure bulk licenses and reduce reliance on costly individual...
watchlist_en: Final rulings from the UK Supreme Court regarding global FRAND jurisdiction and their impact on international licensing precedents.
Upcoming UK Intellectual Property Office policy details concerning necessity reviews and enhanced transparency requirements for standard-essential patents.
Diverging regulatory approaches between US and EU authorities regarding collective licensing groups and potential antitrust implications for multinational negotiations.

topics.headline_zh: 欧盟商标司法收紧与融资新政
topics.headline_en: EU Trademark Law Tightens While New IP Financing Policies Emerge
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧盟商标体系呈现司法从严与政策松绑双重趋势。法院强化在先权利稳定性审查及功能特征驳回标准，德国恶意注册风险激增；同时EUIPO推出中小企业基金并推动IP融资改革，旨在降低合规成本并释放创新资本。企业需平衡维权严谨性与资产金融化机遇。
key_points: 司法裁判趋严：CJEU裁定异议期间在先权利须持续有效，动态商标若具纯技术功能将被驳回，普通法院强调声誉评估需全局考量。
合规风险升级：德国警示AI辅助的恶意抢注激增，UKIPO警告假冒耗材供应链风险，要求企业建立严格溯源与监控机制。
政策红利释放：EUIPO启动2026中小企业基金补贴申请费用，并发布报告建议通过IP抵押解锁5800亿欧元创新融资。
actions: 优化注册策略：利用EUIPO SME Fund降低欧盟商标注册成本，优先选择稳定注册商标作为异议基础，规避未注册权利失效风险。
强化风控体系：针对德国市场建立商标监控机制以防范恶意抢注，完善供应链尽职调查以应对假冒指控，确保在先使用证据链完整。
探索资产变现：关注欧盟IP融资政策动向，规范知识产权管理流程，评估将商标等无形资产用于信贷抵押的可行性以拓宽融资渠道。
watchlist: 观察欧洲法院后续是否就“声誉评估”及“技术功能动态商标”出台更明确的配套裁判口径或指南。
监测塞浦路斯等成员国在数字投资背景下对商标战略资产属性的具体规则动态及配套安排。
追踪EUIPO关于手工艺地理标志简化转化程序的后续案例，以及AI生成内容对现有IP执法框架的具体冲击。
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the European Union trademark landscape is defined by stricter judicial standards and evolving policy frameworks. Courts are reinforcing the stability requirements for prior rights in opposition proceedings and strictly applying functionality exclusions to dynamic marks. Concurrently, authorities in key jurisdictions like Germany report a surge in bad-faith filings facilitated by AI tools, while supply chain risks from counterfeit goods intensify. On the policy front, the EUIPO has launched its 2026 SME Fund to subsidize registration costs and released reports advocating for reforms to unlock significant capital through intellectual property-backed financing. Companies must balance rigorous enforcement strategies with opportunities to leverage intangible assets for financial growth, ensuring robust compliance and asset management practices.

topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued a warning regarding the significant risks associated with counterfeit ink and toner cartridges, particularly affecting small businesses. Citing an OECD and EUIPO report, the agency estimates global counterfeiting trade at approximately USD 467 billion, noting strong links to organized crime networks. The blog highlights that online marketplaces frequently facilitate the sale of fake goods by third-party sellers. Crucially, counterfeit print consumables often cause serious operational damage to printing equipment, yet manufacturers of these fake products typically evade liability for resulting damages. This lack of recourse leaves businesses bearing the full cost of repairs or replacements. Consequently, organizations must prioritize robust procurement systems to prevent the infiltration of counterfeit items into their supply chains, ensuring...
key_points_en: Counterfeit print consumables cause severe operational damage, with fake manufacturers typically avoiding liability for resulting losses.
Global counterfeit trade is valued at approximately USD 467 billion and is closely linked to organized crime networks.
Online third-party sellers frequently distribute counterfeit goods, necessitating rigorous procurement controls to prevent supply chain infiltration.
actions_en: Review procurement contracts to ensure supplier warranties explicitly cover equipment damage caused by defective or counterfeit consumables.
Implement visual and functional verification protocols for high-volume consumable purchases to effectively distinguish genuine items from fakes.
Establish comprehensive compliance and traceability frameworks to mitigate risks of counterfeit allegations and protect brand reputation.
watchlist_en: Monitor subsequent enforcement actions by IP offices targeting counterfeit print consumables and related hardware.
Track judicial precedents in the EU and UK concerning liability determinations for counterfeit goods and supply chain negligence.
Observe evolving tactics employed by organized crime groups in intellectual property infringement and cross-border e-commerce fraud.
